name: Veal with Tuna Mayonnaise

ingredients.item: veal nut (noix or topside), wrapped very tightly in cheesecloth (muslin)
large onion, cut into large pieces
handful capers, plus extra for garnish

method: Place the tuna, anchovies and capers in a food processor, pulse to mix and add 1–2 ladlefuls of the veal stock. The tuna mixture should be like a thick cream. Taste and add salt and pepper if needed.

Slice the veal very thinly and arrange on a serving plate. Mix some of the mayonnaise with the tuna mixture and spread some of it over the sliced meat and put the rest in a bowl, to serve on the side. Garnish with capers.
